claim: Janus Pro is both multimodal understanding and image generation in one model; uses SigLIP for vision and VQ tokenizer for generation
actionable: Evaluate Janus Pro for projects needing both image understanding and generation; single model reduces complexity
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro

claim: DeepSeek uses auto-regressive image generation with VQ tokenization instead of diffusion; throwback to VQ-VAE approach
actionable: Monitor auto-regressive image generation; DeepSeek demonstrates viability of non-diffusion approaches
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro

claim: 7B Janus Pro generates lower resolution than state-of-the-art diffusion models but acceptable quality for many use cases
actionable: Use Janus Pro for rapid prototyping and local generation; compare with Flux/Stable Diffusion for high-resolution needs
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro

claim: Janus Pro is not censored like proprietary models; capable of generating diverse content without safety restrictions
actionable: Use with caution; Janus Pro has fewer content filters than OpenAI/Google models
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro

claim: Janus Pro model weighs ~15GB; requires A100 GPU for full resolution; may need quantization for smaller GPUs
actionable: Plan GPU requirements; test quantized versions on consumer hardware before deployment
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro

claim: Janus Pro handles OCR, scene understanding, detailed descriptions; auto-regressive language model provides deeper understanding than surface-level
actionable: Use Janus Pro for document processing and scene understanding; leverage language model component for rich descriptions
source_title: DeepSeek's New Image Model - Janus Pro
